## What does this change do?

<!-- One or two plain sentences in your own words. -->


## Checklist (be honest)

- [ ] I ran `bash check_standard.sh` and it printed **"All clear"**.
- [ ] Everything I added is in the **Allowed** lists in `CODING_STANDARD.md`.
- [ ] I used `getElementById` (not `querySelector`) and inline `onclick` /
      `onchange` (not `addEventListener`).
- [ ] No flexbox, grid, arrow functions, `fetch`, or template literals.
- [ ] **I can explain every line of this change out loud** if a teacher asks.
- [ ] If I needed an advanced technique, I stopped and asked the group instead.

## Reviewer

- [ ] I checked the code against `CODING_STANDARD.md`.
- [ ] I'm satisfied the author understands what they wrote.
